zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Mariot Murray於1411年出生在蘇格蘭培爾圖利巴迪時，她的父親Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine52歲，母親Isabel Stewart33歲。她於1429年7月14日與Malcolm Drummond在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1445年7月14日在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Mariot Murray于1411年出生在苏格兰培爾圖利巴迪时，她的父亲Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine52岁，母亲Isabel Stewart33岁。她于1429年7月14日与Malcolm Drummond在英国苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1445年7月14日在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Murray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moray in northeastern Scotland, which derives from Celtic mori- ‘sea’ + treb- ‘settlement’. The founder of the Scottish house of Murray was a Fleming named Freskin who was granted Strathbrock in West Lothian and Duffus in Moray by David I. The family took its name from the region in the late 12th century.
Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McMurray  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireadhaigh ‘descendant of Muireadhach’ a personal name meaning ‘mariner’. Occasionally it may be a shortened form of McMurray .

variants.name: Murri
meanings: Probably Scottish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murry
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murrah
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Murray  .

variants.name: Murie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel.
Scottish: habitational name from Murie in Errol (Perthshire).
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Merhi
meanings: Arabic (mainly Lebanon and Syria): from a variant of the personal name Mirhi of unknown meaning. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Murray 5.

variants.name: Murrey
meanings: Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murra
meanings: Italian (Sicily): topographic name from Sicilian murra ‘large rock, mass of rocks’ or a habitational name from a place called with this word.
East Frisian: unexplained.
Albanian: nickname from murrë (definite form murra) ‘dark gray cow’.

variants.name: Murrie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Murray  .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

nameMeanings.name: Mariot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of   Marguerite  , now used as an independent given name. In England it is still usually pronounced in the French way, but in Eastern Europe the final consonant is sounded, and this has had some influence in America.

variants.name: Margaux
meanings: Fanciful respelling of   Margot  , inspired by a village near Bordeaux noted for its red wine.

variants.name: Margo
meanings: pet form of   Marguerite  , now used as an independent given name. In England it is still usually pronounced in the French way, but in Eastern Europe the final consonant is sounded, and this has had some influence in America.

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Mariot Murray was born in 1411, in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine, was 52 and her mother, Isabel Stewart, was 33. She married Malcolm Drummond on 14 July 1429, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 14 July 1445, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Mariot Murray est née en 1411, à Tullibardine, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Isabel Stewart, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Malcolm Drummond le 14 juillet 1429, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1445, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Sie hat am 14. Juli 1429 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Malcolm Drummond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 14. Juli 1445 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland.

Lei sposato Malcolm Drummond il 14 luglio 1429, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. ko.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 퍼스
ko.lifeSummary: Marion Mariot Murray(이)가 1411년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 툴리바딘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Stewart(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1429년 7월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Malcolm Drummond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 7월 14일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Malcolm Drummond em 14 de julho de 1429, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: пирт, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Mariot Murray родилась в 1411 г. в местности туллибардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Stewart, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcolm Drummond 14 июля 1429 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 14 июля 1445 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 34 лет.
